subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-08
subcodes.first_line: During the lifetime of Bahá'u'lláh the inhabitants of the village, Mokeiss, were most anxious that I may buy half of their real estate
